section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column (3 assets). Selections are black-filled cells. Value: col1 (Netflix) C, col2 (Nike SP) D, col3 (Nike DC) C. Type of Income: col1 None; col2+col3 Dividends. Amount of Income: col1 A:None; col2+col3 B:$1-$200. Transaction row is a continuous black band with no P/S/E letter - treated as divider/redaction, recorded null.

uncertainties.read: Transaction row black-filled across all 3 columns
uncertainties.note: continuous black band with no P/S/E letter visible; treated as divider/redaction, recorded null for all three assets
